import{createSlice}from"@reduxjs/toolkit";const initialState={user:null};export const userSlice=createSlice({name:"user",initialState,reducers:{login:(state,action)=>{state.user=action.payload;},logout:state=>{state.user=null;}}});// console.log(userSlice);
export const{login,logout}=userSlice.actions;export default userSlice.reducer;
